monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Strikes US-Controlled Vessels in Strait of Hormuz
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 33m ago. Iranian forces targeted multiple vessels sailing in the US-controlled Omani corridor of the Strait of Hormuz, according to Tasnim.

Trump Announces US Naval Blockade of All Iranian Ports and Oil Terminals, Starting Tuesday, Warns Neutral Ships to Leave or Face Fire, Imposes 20% Toll on Strait of Hormuz Transit, Escalating Tensions
— S4 · Political · Strait of Hormuz · 2h ago. The US Army announces a naval blockade on all Iranian ports, effective from 20:00 GMT tomorrow.
